description: Janino is a small, fast Java compiler and expression-evaluation library that can compile Java source code, scripts, and expressions at run time. The janino artifact implements the commons-compiler API and provides parser, evaluator, and utility classes for embedding dynamic Java compilation in JVM applications.

Janino is a lightweight Java compiler and expression evaluation library that can compile Java source, scripts, and expressions at run time without relying on the JDK tools compiler. The janino artifact provides the JANINO implementation of the commons-compiler API along with parser, evaluator, and utility classes for embedding dynamic Java compilation in JVM applications.
